result.summary: LambdaTest (now TestMu AI) exposes multiple authenticated HTTP APIs—including Screenshots, Selenium Automation, and HyperExecute—and ships CLIs for Cypress, SmartUI, and Kane; no public GraphQL or MCP connect endpoint was confirmed from lambdatest.com docs.
result.description: LambdaTest, now rebranded as TestMu AI, provides cloud-based browser, device, and test automation infrastructure plus related testing products such as visual testing and HyperExecute. Its platform is used to run and manage automated tests, screenshots, and related QA workflows.

lt_basic.label: LambdaTest/TestMu AI username and access key
lt_basic.setup: Create an account at [TestMu AI signup](https://www.testmuai.com/register/). The API docs and CLI READMEs state integrations use your account `username` plus `access key`; store them and send as HTTP Basic auth (`username:access_key`) or set CLI env vars like `LT_USERNAME` and `LT_ACCESS_KEY` where supported.
